description: Advanced text extraction and document conversion plugin. Extracts text from PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX and converts documents to Markdown format.

commands.name: extract text
commands.description: Extract plain text content from various document formats including PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, TXT, RTF. Supports OCR for scanned documents. Default output is raw text only (pipeline-friendly). Use --verbose for progress info or --stats for statistics.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: Path to the document file

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: OCR language code (ces, eng, deu, ...)

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.description: Show progress info and statistics (to stderr)

parameters.name: stats
parameters.description: Show extraction statistics (to stderr)

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Convert documents (PDF, XLSX, XLS, ODS, DOCX, PPTX, EML, MSG), calendar invites (ICS) and audio recordings (MP3, WAV, M4A, OGG, FLAC) to Markdown format with support for heading detection, tracked changes, comments, sheet selection, slide-as-chapter presentations, email header formatting, calendar event metadata frontmatter, and offline speech-to-text (via the vox plugin).

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: Path to the document file

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Output file path (default: stdout)

parameters.name: sheets
parameters.description: Comma-separated sheet names for Excel files

parameters.name: track-changes
parameters.description: Annotate revisions with author/date markers (DOCX, default behavior)

parameters.name: accept-changes
parameters.description: Accept all changes: clean output without markers, deletions removed (DOCX)

parameters.name: comments
parameters.description: Include document comments (DOCX)

parameters.name: header-format
parameters.description: Header format for EML: yaml (default) or table

parameters.name: all-headers
parameters.description: Include all email headers (EML)

parameters.name: extract-attachments
parameters.description: Extract attachments to specified directory (EML)

parameters.name: strip-signature
parameters.description: Remove email signature from body (EML)

parameters.name: keep-inline-images
parameters.description: Keep decorative inline images (spacers, signature logos) in the body; dropped by default (EML/MSG)

parameters.name: audio-lang
parameters.description: Language code for audio transcription, e.g. cs, en; default auto-detect (Audio, via vox plugin)

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Append speaker notes as a separate block per slide (PPTX)

parameters.name: slide-numbers
parameters.description: Prefix slide chapter headings with 'Slide N:' even when a title exists (PPTX)

parameters.name: shape-order
parameters.description: Shape traversal order within a slide: reading (default) or document (PPTX)

parameters.name: preserve-colors
parameters.description: Keep colored text runs from HTML/MSG/EML bodies

parameters.name: color-style
parameters.description: Color marker style: html-span (default), highlight, emoji, bracket

parameters.name: marked-colors
parameters.description: Comma-separated colors to preserve (literal match disables redish heuristic)

parameters.name: pdf-metadata
parameters.description: Include YAML frontmatter with document metadata (PDF)

parameters.name: pdf-no-headings
parameters.description: Disable heading detection based on font size (PDF)

parameters.name: pdf-pagebreak
parameters.description: Page break style: hr (default), comment, none (PDF)

parameters.name: pdf-pages
parameters.description: Page range to extract, e.g., 1-10 or 5 (PDF)

parameters.name: pdf-ocr
parameters.description: OCR fallback for scanned PDFs: auto (default), on, off

parameters.name: pdf-ocr-lang
parameters.description: Tesseract language code(s) for OCR, e.g. eng, ces, ces+eng

parameters.name: pdf-ocr-dpi
parameters.description: Render DPI for OCR pages (default: 300)

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.description: Verbose output

examples: text-extractor convert scanned.pdf --pdf-ocr on --pdf-ocr-lang eng -o scanned.md
